node.title: User Migration - Ookla Speedtest Custom
node.Stub: Ookla – the team behind speedtest.net – also offers an enterprise version of their flagship software used to measure bandwidth and latency between a client and server. During the transition from legacy Flash protocols to new HTML5/Javscript APIs, I lead a small team of technical service contractors to assist with the increased workload from the transition.

node.title: Unable to verify HTTPS server configuration – Ookla Speedtest Custom
node.Stub: To support the latest browser security protocols, it was important that vendors follow guidelines to ensure their server networking software could pass the routine security monitoring watchdog process developed by Ookla.
node.Subject_Matter: HTTPS, SSL Certificates, Transport Layer Security (TLS)

node.title: Storing STC results using Javascript – Ookla Speedtest Custom
node.Stub: To help with proving a popular use case, we provided a code sample written in PHP to help demonstrate how data could be exchanged from Javascript to a SQL database.
node.Subject_Matter: Cross-Origin Resource Sharing (CORS), JavaScript, PHP, SQL, XHR
